headline: Weekend scan: ON/WDC/STX damage holds; Gulf escalation adds oil/defense bid; no desk takes.

market_state.line: SPY -0.54% / QQQ -1.49%, both below 50d. VXX stress ratio 0.98 — vol not spiking but not benign. No edge for new longs.

watch.line: -23.82% on 3.3× volume — largest single-name damage on tape; watch for dead-cat vs. continued flush Monday open.
-13.12% on 2.25× vol, MACD bearish; storage sector under pressure alongside STX.
-12.49% on 3.1× vol, MACD bearish; confirms storage/HDD sector rotation out — sector read, not just single name.
+12.64% on 2× vol, overbought flag; watch for fade vs. follow-through — no catalyst confirmed in scan.
+22.16%, MACD bullish; Gulf energy risk premium may sustain alt-energy interest Monday.

changed: Previous headline flagged overnight scan; this is weekend window — same wreckage (ON/WDC/STX) still leading tape.
New macro input: Gulf conflict escalation (Iran talks stalled, Kuwait/Bahrain involvement) adds oil/defense risk premium not present in prior scan.
caveats: WEEKEND scan window — prices as of 2026-06-28 15:37 ET Friday close. No price discovery until Monday premarket; gaps likely given Gulf macro developments.
